mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projects (id, name, description, project_key, owner_id, status, metadata, ticket_sequence, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}, #{name}, #{description}, #{projectKey}, #{ownerId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{metadata}::jsonb, 0, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE projects SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, project_key = #{projectKey}, owner_id = #{ownerId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}, status = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, metadata = #{metadata}::jsonb, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE project_key = #{projectKey}
SELECT ticket_sequence + 1 FROM projects WHERE id = #{projectId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}
mapper.update: UPDATE projects SET ticket_sequence = ticket_sequence + 1 WHERE id = #{projectId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}
